summary: BrokerSaab backend and frontend smoke tested. Found and FIXED 1 critical bug in /api/auth/register/complete (await on uncalled function). After fix, all 20 backend pytest cases pass covering categories, advisors, OTP auth (client + advisor signup), bookings, end-to-end quote->ticket->stages->close flow with 15% commission payout, and wallet. Frontend smoke test (client OTP login -> Discover) succeeds; dev OTP visible in UI; welcome ₹500 credited; authorized dealers shown first with badge. Minor React Native web deprecation console warnings ('shadow*' and 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated) observed.

minor.issue: Originally crashed with 500 due to bare 'await adjust_wallet' (function object, not coroutine) on line 249. FIXED by removing the no-op line. RCA: typo/leftover scaffolding.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Will break on future RN versions. Reference: search shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius in /app/frontend/app/**.tsx.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Some component (likely auth.tsx or layout) passes pointerEvents as prop instead of via style.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate React Native shadow* style props to boxShadow and move pointerEvents from props to style to silence deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Increase JWT_SECRET to >=32 bytes — pyjwt emits InsecureKeyLengthWarning for 21-byte secret.
Consider strengthening OTP rate-limit / expiry; currently OTP record has created_at but no expiry check on /auth/otp/verify.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 249 had 'await adjust_wallet' (function reference, not call) — caused 500 on EVERY new client registration. Fixed by removing.
JWT_SECRET hardcoded ('brokersaab-dev-secret') and only 21 bytes; should come from env and be at least 32 bytes for HS256.
register_complete returns 'is_new=True' user JSON without re-fetching from DB if user already exists path is fine, but no idempotency guard around duplicate phone+role race.
OTP /verify does not check OTP expiration window (created_at unused).
advisor_signup auto-approves (status=APPROVED) intentionally per MVP — acceptable but logged here.
All endpoints correctly strip MongoDB _id via PROJ = {'_id': 0}. Good.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded via server startup: 19 categories, 8 demo advisors. Tests create TEST_ prefixed transient client (phone 9999999999) and advisor (phone 9888888880).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests are idempotent for advisor_signup only on a fresh DB (TEST advisor phone 9888888880). If re-running on same DB, advisor_signup will be skipped (pytest.skip) — to fully re-run, clean test data with the snippet inside /app/backend/tests or drop users where phone in [9999999999,9888888880].
rca_of_issue: Bug: /api/auth/register/complete returned HTTP 500. Reproduction: POST {phone:'9999999999',role:'client',full_name:'X'} after OTP verify. Root cause: server.py line 249 had `await adjust_wallet` (referencing the function object itself, not invoking it) — Python's await requires an awaitable, so raised TypeError. Mitigation: removed the dead line. All downstream client-auth dependent tests then pass.
